message:
fix: oracle eager-capture violations, DNS absolute-name caching, debounce test isolation

Agent changes (audited SOUND by SapphireHill):
- lab/oracle/{finalizer,obligation_leak,task_leak}.rs: capture violations
  eagerly at on_region_close time for accurate temporal context
- dns/resolver.rs: preserve absolute vs relative name semantics in cache
  (example.com. and example.com may resolve differently via search domains)
- dns/cache.rs: test for trailing-dot hostname cache separation
- record/symbolic_obligation.rs: extract percent_complete helper
- stream/debounce.rs: thread-local test time prevents parallel test interference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
